case_title: DALE SINGH VS. JIM STEPHENS et. al.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEFENDANT JIM STEPHENS REPRESENTED DEFENDANTS CLARISSA LAGRENE AND SELINA KEENE. FILED BY DEFENDANT STEPHENS, JIM KEENE, SELINA LAGRENE, CLARISSA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 SERVED JUN-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAGRENE, CLARISSA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY SINGH, DALE DBA (DALE'S AUTO SERVICE) STEPHENS, JIM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JUN-30-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STEPHENS, JIM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-10-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT JIM STEPHENS AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF A TOTAL OF $3,144.11 IN TWO INSTALLMENTS & AGREES TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH HIS CREDIT CARD NUMBER FOR THE INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS. THE FIRST PAYMENT WILL BE MADE ON AUGUST 8, 2014 IN THE AMOUNT OF $500. THE SECOND & FINAL PAYMENT FOR THE BALANCE OF $2,644.11 WILL BE MADE ON AUGUST 29, 2014. CASE IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 10, 2014 @ 1:30PM FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS (2) CLARISSA LAGRENE AND SELINA KEENE WERE NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. DEFENDANTS (2) CLARISSA LAGRENE AND SELINA KEENE WHO WERE REPRESENTED BY JIM STEPHENS--EMPLOYEE. DEFENDANT JIM STEPHENS WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE FOR HIMSELF AND FOR DEFENDANT SELINA KEENE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT BY PLAINTIFF TO OCT-23-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAN WEINGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 7/22/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,919.11 FILED BY SINGH, DALE DBA (DALE'S AUTO SERVICE) AS TO DEFENDANT STEPHENS, JIM KEENE, SELINA LAGRENE, CLARISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) DOCUMENT STAMPED: FILED BY FAX SERVED JUL-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEENE, SELINA
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DALE SINGH ON 09-10-14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNWON-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION - SENT TO PLAINTIFF - UNABLE TO FORWARD
